calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Stanley W. Riddell, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Suet Ying Lau

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintif Suet Lau's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses and produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
